findings.description: Anders Monsen married Unna Halsteinsdatter on 25 June 1786 at Hamre (parish church), Hordaland, Norway.
supporting_sources: "Norway, Marriages, 1660-1926", database, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:NW44-PM2 : 20 February 2020), Anders Monsen, 1786.

findings.description: The marriage is documented in the FamilySearch-indexed collection "Norway, Marriages, 1660-1926," which lists Anders Monsen's 1786 marriage entry.
